positive: A minimalist, stylized design featuring interconnected geometric woodland creatures: a serene fawn, a stately owl, a nimble fox, and a gentle deer, all rendered in clean, continuous line art. The animals are composed using negative space and solid silhouettes against a pale, creamy background. The composition is perfectly centralized and symmetrical, emphasizing negative space and clean edges. Style: Nordic forest etching meets modern abstract vector illustration. Color Palette: Earth tones (sage green, charcoal grey, cream, deep rust) with crisp black lines. Lighting: Flat, even daylight, studio shot quality. Composition details: High contrast, vector style, perfect for t-shirt printing, scalable, clean silhouette focus.
negative: photorealistic, text, logo, watermark, signature, blurry, noisy, artifacts, bad anatomy, messy, complex background, grunge, low resolution, multiple subjects overlap, bad composition
